Title: Orders List — Row Click Navigates to Order Detail
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
User has at least one existing order. {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders is accessible.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] orders table renders with at least one data row visible
[ACT] click the first order row (anywhere in the row outside interactive child elements)
[WAIT] page navigation completes
Assertions:
[NAV] URL matches pattern {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders/<id> where <id> is a non-empty string
[DOM] order detail page renders: order number or status heading visible
[DOM] no 404 or error page shown
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no Vue warn or TypeError during row click
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on navigation request
Failure_Signals: Row click produces no navigation; URL unchanged after click; blank page after navigation; 404 on detail page

Title: Orders List — Keyboard Row Activation (Enter and Space)
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
User has at least one existing order. {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders is accessible.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] orders table renders with at least one data row visible
[KEY] press Tab until focus lands on the first order row (verify focus ring visible)
[ASSERT] row has visible focus indicator (focus-visible ring or outline)
[KEY] press Enter
[WAIT] page navigation completes
[NAV] navigate back (browser back)
[WAIT] orders list reloads
[KEY] press Tab until focus lands on the first order row again
[KEY] press Space
[WAIT] page navigation completes
Assertions:
[NAV] after Enter: URL matches pattern {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders/<id>
[DOM] order detail page renders without blank content
[NAV] after Space: URL matches same pattern {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders/<id>
[DOM] order detail page renders without blank content
[DOM] focus ring visible on row before activation (sufficient contrast)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no accessibility-related Vue warn during keyboard interaction
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on both navigations
Failure_Signals: Tab does not reach any order row; Enter on focused row causes no navigation; Space on focused row causes no navigation; URL unchanged; focus lost after Tab navigation; no visible focus ring

Title: Orders List — Sticky Header Remains Visible on Scroll
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
User has enough orders that the table body is taller than the visible viewport or the table's maxHeight container (at least 10+ orders preferred). {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders is accessible.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] orders table renders with multiple rows
[SCROLL] scroll down past at least 3 order rows (either within the table container or the page)
[WAIT] scroll settles
Assertions:
[DOM] column header row (with labels such as order number, date, status, total) is still visible in the viewport after scrolling — header has not scrolled out of view
[DOM] no visual artifact (doubled header, misaligned header, header overlapping data row) after scroll
[DOM] fixed left column (if present) remains pinned at the left edge during horizontal scroll
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no layout or CSS errors emitted during scroll
[NETWORK] no unexpected requests triggered by scrolling
Failure_Signals: Column headers scroll out of view immediately on any downward scroll; header text appears duplicated; fixed column jumps position during scroll; JS error on scroll event
